ogTitle: Echuca West vs Ecklin South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Echuca West and Ecklin South.
heading: Echuca West vs Ecklin South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Echuca West, Victoria and Ecklin South, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Echuca West has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Ecklin South (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Echuca West or Ecklin South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Echuca West has a flood risk score of 25/100, while Ecklin South scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Echuca West scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Ecklin South scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Echuca West or Ecklin South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Echuca West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
